question: What's your favourite poem that you've written?
answer: I don't go back and read them all too often, so I don't really have a favourite right now. Maybe in 322 more Earth rotations I will.

question: why write?
answer: I don't know why other people write; I know why I write though. Feels good, can't stop, and all the things les autres ecrivains disaient before I started.

question: how are you?
answer: Je survis un jour de plus.
